title: the Sprunki mod
description: adds all the sprunki characters and some item drops for them!
body:
# WELCOME!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod adds all the sprunki characters to the game! i am making this just for fun and hope people enjoy it 😊
I am working real hard on this mod so i really hope that people like it!
that's all i have to say, hope you enjoy!

# IMAGES
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Fun Bots model ![fun bots model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38b1c413acddbf9ec6cd53c186db2cc6e1c00758_0.webp)
Fun Bot Visor on player ![Fun Bots visor on player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4188d239f6ff442c81df4bd0085eb6b2bc2b6bfd.png)
Clukrs symbol on player ![clukrssymbol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c5a43e3583e1728678796360252aa0e771ed0b.png)
